title: The Deep(The Peak)
description: The Deep comes in Minecraft, but in "brainrot" version.
body:
## Overview

Dive into the mysterious world of The Peak, a unique Minecraft mod that brings a single, formidable entity to your game: The Deep.

![THE DEEP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb23135748edce4458ef12921d55b92dba2aab5.png)

## New Entity

- **The Deep**: The Deep, from TikTok, will now appear if you will spawn him in creative mod or via command. I beg you spawn him in start of a game for a better experience.

## Purpose & Appeal

- **The Deep** enriches the Minecraft experience by adding a singular, captivating threat that challenges players both mentally and physically. Also it`s ***THE DEEP***, so of course you need to spawn him earlier. The Deep Spawn Egg can be found in "Spawn Eggs" tab
![The Deep egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4539cde975990b9e20f0300ef92424d67be80d6c.png)

## Environment Information

**The Peak** is fully compatible with both client and server environments, ensuring a seamless and immersive experience whether you’re playing solo or with friends.
![The Deeps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11864ff05c4a65fa28e1d76a3e8a59012ac0ea14.png)

_P.S: The mod is still in development, updates will come._
